title: A_BG_MTB
growth_protocol_ch1: Monocytes were negatively selected from peripheral blood and cultured in RPMI and 10% human serum for 6 days.
extract_protocol_ch1: RNA was extracted using the RNEasy mini kit.
data_processing: MMSEQ package was used to infer gene expression levels. Reads were mapped to the genome using Bowtie1
data_processing.2: Supplementary_files_format_and_content: RNA files are in a .gene.mmseq.txt format, containing counts per gene and log RPKM.
contact_address: Murdoch Children's Research Institute, Royal Children's Hospital, Flemington Road
